---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---

<style>

/* ===== PAGE ===== */

body{
margin:0;
font-family:"Times New Roman", serif;
overflow:hidden;
}


/* ===== DIRECTORY BAR ===== */

.top-banner{

position:fixed;
top:0;
left:0;

width:100%;

background:#5c3a1e;
border-bottom:3px solid #d4a84f;

padding:4px 0;

text-align:center;

z-index:100;

}


/* ===== NAV LINKS ===== */

.top-banner a{

color:#ffd86b;

text-decoration:none;

font-weight:bold;

font-size:15px;

letter-spacing:1px;

text-transform:uppercase;

margin:0 14px;

line-height:22px;

}


/* ===== MAP ===== */

#map{

position:absolute;

top:30px;
left:0;

width:100vw;
height:calc(100vh - 30px);

background-image:url("pokemonmap.jpg");
background-size:cover;
background-position:center;

}


/* ===== WELCOME OVERLAY ===== */

.overlay{

position:absolute;

top:50%;
left:50%;

transform:translate(-50%,-50%);

text-align:center;

color:white;

z-index:50;

transition:opacity .8s ease;

}


.welcome{

font-size:90px;
text-shadow:0 0 30px black;

}

.quote{

margin-top:20px;

font-size:26px;

background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);

padding:20px 30px;

border-radius:12px;

}


/* ===== SPRITES ===== */

.sprite{

position:absolute;
image-rendering:pixelated;
z-index:10;

}

.trainer{
width:90px;
}

.gengar{
width:60px;
}

.pikachu{
width:45px;
}

.ditto{
width:40px;
}

</style>


<div class="top-banner">

<a href="index.html">HOME</a>
<a href="portfolio.html">PORTFOLIO</a>
<a href="upperdivs.html">UPPER DIVS</a>

</div>


<div id="map">


<div class="overlay" id="overlay">

<div class="welcome">
WELCOME
</div>

<div class="quote">

"I want to take everything I learn, each day, and put it to use."
<br>
Pokémon Journeys Episode 147

</div>

</div>


<img id="trainer"
src="trainer.gif"
class="sprite trainer"
style="left:50%; top:60%;">


<img src="gengar.gif"
class="sprite gengar"
style="left:75%; top:35%;">


<img src="ditto.gif"
class="sprite ditto"
style="left:25%; top:65%;">


<img src="pikachu.gif"
class="sprite pikachu"
style="left:65%; top:75%;">


</div>


<script>

/* ===== TRAINER MOVEMENT ===== */

const trainer = document.getElementById("trainer");
const overlay = document.getElementById("overlay");

let x = window.innerWidth * 0.5;
let y = window.innerHeight * 0.6;

trainer.style.left = x + "px";
trainer.style.top = y + "px";

const speed = 8;

let faded = false;


document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e){

if(!faded){

overlay.style.opacity="0";
faded=true;

}


if(e.key==="ArrowRight"){
x+=speed;
trainer.style.transform="scaleX(1)";
}

if(e.key==="ArrowLeft"){
x-=speed;
trainer.style.transform="scaleX(-1)";
}

if(e.key==="ArrowUp"){
y-=speed;
}

if(e.key==="ArrowDown"){
y+=speed;
}


if(x<0) x=0;
if(y<0) y=0;

if(x>window.innerWidth-100) x=window.innerWidth-100;
if(y>window.innerHeight-100) y=window.innerHeight-100;


trainer.style.left=x+"px";
trainer.style.top=y+"px";

});

</script>
